review_text: Good interface, but... It'd be way better if Spotify on mobile devices was like Spotify on computers. Just look at how much more freedom you get on a computer when you listen to music in comparison with how limited the mobile version is! I don't know why it is the way it is (most likely marketing, but what isn't nowadays?)... Anyway, not really that good of an experience if you have Spotify Free but I still use it for some reason :/
summary: The user finds the mobile free version of Spotify too limited compared to the desktop version, despite a good interface.
pain_points: mobile version is limited compared to desktop
feature_requests: make mobile experience more like desktop
user_goal: have a less restricted music listening experience on mobile
root_cause: intentional feature limitations for free tier on mobile

review_text: I very much like this app and have loved organizing all my songs and playlists. I'm a musician, so I have dozens of playlists. Overall great app, but please bring back the hearts! I don't know why it ever needed to get changed, but I way much more prefered the heart symbol to like a song over the little plus sign. It's now much more complicated than it needed to be.
summary: The user praises the app for organizing songs and playlists but is disappointed by the change from heart to plus sign for liking songs, finding it more complicated.
pain_points: new plus sign for liking songs is more complicated
feature_requests: bring back the heart symbol for liking songs
user_goal: easily like songs and manage music library
root_cause: UI change for liking songs made the process less intuitive for the user

review_text: Always loved this app. I pay for premium but you still add commercials even though I pay to not have commercials. Granted they can be skipped, but I don't EVEN WANT THEM THATS THE POINT OF PAYING NOT TO HAVE THEM, having the ability to skip is pointless when I have to pick up my phone a million times during a podcast to skip the stupid BOSE headphones commercials. Per Spotify they told me to contact customer support, which I have, and they've never responded or fixed it.
summary: The premium user is angry about still receiving skippable commercials during podcasts, which defeats the purpose of paying for a commercial-free experience, and has received no resolution from customer support.
feature_requests: remove all commercials for premium users
user_goal: listen to podcasts without interruptions from commercials
root_cause: premium subscription benefit (no ads) is not being fully delivered for podcasts; customer support failure

review_text: Plays 1 song at a time. No longer able to listen to playlists or stations. It stops after 1 song. I've cleared cache. Restarted my phone. Uninstalled and reinstalled. Even cleared storage and Uninstalled other apps. Nothing works. I stopped my subscription due to similar issues and now this free version is no longer worth the work or time. I'm done.
summary: The user is experiencing a critical bug where only one song plays at a time, preventing playlist or station listening, and has tried multiple troubleshooting steps without success, leading them to stop using the app.
pain_points: plays only one song at a time
free version is not worth the time
user_goal: listen to music continuously from playlists or stations
root_cause: critical playback bug preventing continuous listening
discovery_issue: The user is unable to listen to stations, which is a form of music discovery, due to a playback bug.

review_text: Tbh I'm constantly having issues with the app. It never remembers what podcast episode I last listened to so I have to scroll forever everytime I listen to something else. It freezes a lot or takes forever to start playing. Tons of issues in Android auto with it. Freezing and just not playing, or playing but no sound is coming out. The widget almost never seems to work and I used to use it all the time. Samsung 24 Ultra. Also I'd like to be able to message my friends songs right in the app plz
summary: The user is constantly frustrated by multiple app issues including podcasts not remembering progress, frequent freezing, Android Auto problems, a non-functional widget, and desires an in-app messaging feature for sharing songs.
pain_points: app takes forever to start playing
issues with Android Auto (freezing, no sound)
feature_requests: add in-app messaging for sharing songs
user_goal: reliably listen to podcasts and music, control playback easily, share music with friends
root_cause: multiple performance bugs across different features and integrations; lack of a social sharing feature

review_text: The apps performance really has degraded recently. Crashing every thirty or so minutes, randomly pausing songs, or just straight up dropping the playlist after it crashes and starts playing "trending" songs. I can't listen to custom mixes anymore because it crashes and kills the playlist so I have to restart it. The advertisement vs song ratio has become has become a joke, I can listen to FM radio stations and get less ads.
summary: The user reports significant app performance degradation, including frequent crashes, random pausing, dropping playlists, and an excessive advertisement-to-song ratio, making custom mixes unusable.
pain_points: app starts playing "trending" songs after crash
unable to listen to custom mixes
user_goal: listen to music from custom mixes and playlists without interruptions
root_cause: severe performance bugs leading to crashes and playback interruptions; aggressive ad frequency for free users
discovery_issue: App crashes disrupt listening to custom mixes and force playback of "trending" songs, hindering personalized discovery.

review_text: If we can add a playlist from the queue, add a "remove playlist from queue" option next. It's so annoying; I accidentally added a playlist from my queue, and whenever I try to listen to another song, that queue immediately plays. Also, can you all add something that will display the genre of the song? It will be very much appreciated.
summary: The user is frustrated by accidentally adding playlists to the queue and not being able to remove them, and requests a feature to display song genres.
pain_points: unable to remove playlist from queue
user_goal: manage playback queue effectively; understand song genres
root_cause: lack of granular control over queue management; missing song metadata display
discovery_issue: The user wants to see song genres to better understand and potentially discover music.

review_text: Used to have a 2 star rating for the app in 2023, and major issues have been updated, but i still continue to have some issues with songs randomly pausing and not playing. The ads are also insane. 3 to 4 30 second ads in a row after only playing a few songs is very irritating to say the least. I don't have the money to be spending $12/mo for premium so it is what it is, but it gets annoying. Otherwise, app is pretty good for listening to music whenever, driving, walking, etc.
summary: The user notes improvements since 2023 but is still frustrated by songs randomly pausing and an excessive number of long ads, which are particularly annoying for a free user.
pain_points: songs randomly pausing and not playing
3-4 30-second ads in a row after few songs
positive_themes: app is pretty good for listening to music
user_goal: listen to music without interruptions from ads or technical glitches
root_cause: performance bug causing random pausing; aggressive ad frequency for free users

review_text: Overall I'm happy but the issue of autoplay for podcast. If you listen to one it then goes to your autoplay list & there's no way to get it off. While driving, an episode of a podcast I like & follow finishes then starts an episode of a podcast that I may have listened to once but did not like. I've combed through the settings & there's + ways to like/add a podcast to your list but none to remove it from your autoplay. Fix it!!
summary: The user is generally happy but frustrated by the podcast autoplay feature, which adds listened podcasts to an unmanageable autoplay list, leading to unwanted content playing, and there's no way to remove them.
pain_points: podcast autoplay adds unwanted podcasts to list
no way to remove podcasts from autoplay list
feature_requests: add option to remove podcasts from autoplay list
user_goal: control podcast playback and avoid unwanted content
root_cause: lack of user control over podcast autoplay queue/list

review_text: Honestly, when i first started using this, it was an awesome app! It's got all my favorite artists in one place, but, after a while, on my phone, it just doesn't work(?) It will not play the next song, and it will get stuck on an ad, which i can't skip since I have to close the app. But overall, it's a great app, aside from the fact that you only have limited lyrics per month and six skins per hour, I love it! It's great for people who have money to spend on premium. (Aside from me, I dont)
summary: The user initially loved the app for its artist collection but now experiences critical playback issues, ads getting stuck, and finds the free version severely limited by restrictions on lyrics and skips, making it only great for premium users.
positive_themes: has all favorite artists in one place
user_goal: listen to music reliably, access lyrics, and skip songs without severe limitations
root_cause: critical playback bug; ad serving bug; intentional feature limitations for free tier
